title: Others - Others - NIELIT 2022 April Scientist B  Section B  Question

sections.name: NIELIT 2022 April Scientist B  Section B  Question

questions.question:
Consider sinusoidal modulation in an \( \text{AM} \) system. Assuming no over modulation, the modulation index (\( \mu \)) when the maximum and minimum values of the envelope, respectively, are \( 3 \; \text{V} \) and \( 1 \; \text{V} \) is ___________.



Others: NIELIT 2022 April Scientist B | Section B | Question: 117
